data-model.name: simple_catalog
data-model.author: xYang.mojo examples
data-model.description: Minimal sample: one entity, primary key plus a string attribute. Suitable for smoke tests and tutorials.

entities.name: product
entities.description: A single product row identified by an integer primary key and human-readable title.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Stable numeric identifier for the product.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Display name shown in catalog listings.
